headline: English Proficiency Among SPM Students Declines for 5th Year
context: SPM English paper results show declining pass rates for five consecutive years from 2021 to 2025.

cards.big: SPM English pass rate dropped from 82% in 2021 to 74% in 2025
cards.sub: Rural schools show sharpest decline with 63% pass rate in 2025

cards.big: EF English Proficiency Index ranks Malaysia 28th globally down from 22nd in 2020
cards.sub: Neighboring countries including Vietnam are closing the English competency gap

cards.big: Only 45% of English teachers in primary schools meet CEFR B2 proficiency standard
cards.sub: Teachers cannot teach a language they themselves have not fully mastered

cards.big: Post-COVID learning loss in language skills estimated at 1.5 grade levels by World Bank
cards.sub: Pandemic disruption disproportionately affected oral communication development

cards.big: English decline is not about national identity—it is about competitive disadvantage
Should English proficiency be treated as an economic imperative not a cultural debate
